close_reason: Positive observation: path validation before token read is correct
description:
src/lib.rs:72-90 — URI validation completes before std::env::var("DOPPLER_TOKEN") is called. This is the right ordering and the test comments document it explicitly (src/lib.rs:288, 299). The from_uri_field_selector_rejected test exploits this property to run without DOPPLER_TOKEN set.

Future contributor temptation: 'cleaner to read the token first since it's needed in every success path.' Counter: it makes URI-parse tests depend on env state and complicates CI hygiene. Keep validation-first.
title: Path-validation fires before DOPPLER_TOKEN is read — testable without env
